name_cn:
Bottega Veneta
This (Denim) Cassette woven cube bag is simple, cool, low-key, and luxurious.
The latest version features a triangle logo pattern on the side! A very commuter-friendly bag with a simple shape and Bottega Veneta's classic weaving art. It is very easy to match with everyday outfits. Every color is premium, and they are all made of soft lambskin, looking very textured. Stylish and chic when worn.
Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or clutch. Unisex.
Size: 23*15*5.5
Style No.: 80820#
